title: oenothera prismatica var. amoena
intro: Oenothera prismatica var. amoena, also known as Evening Primrose, is a plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae) that is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, derived from its seeds, which contain a high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The health benefits of Oenothera prismatica var. amoena include relief from menstrual cramps, eczema, and skin conditions, as well as support for heart health and immune function. Herbal preparations of Oenothera prismatica var. amoena include oil extracts, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
